prompt:
Fix the Super+Z keybinding for launching Zen browser in the Hyprland config.

## Problem
The keybinding on line 207 of home/hyprland.nix runs `exec, zen` but the zen-browser flake's default package (inputs.zen-browser.packages.x86_64-linux.default) provides the binary `zen-beta`, not `zen`. So pressing Super+Z does nothing.

## Fix
In home/hyprland.nix line 207, change:
"$mainMod, Z, Open Zen browser, exec, zen"
to:
"$mainMod, Z, Open Zen browser, exec, zen-beta"

## That's it
This is a one-line fix. Don't change anything else. No tests needed — this is a NixOS config repo.
